localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsDescription: Learn the key features of your hero sheet.
localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsWelcomeContent: This tour walks you through the hero sheet. We'll open a sample hero to demonstrate the key features.
localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsEditModeContent:
This button switches between Play and Edit modes. Edit mode lets you change themes, tags, and character details.

Keyboard shortcut: E
localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsRollContent:
Click this button to open the roll dialog. Select tags on your sheet first by clicking them, then roll.

Keyboard shortcut: R
localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsPromiseContent: The promise track measures your hero's progress toward their moment of fulfillment. Click boxes to advance. When you reach 5, you unlock the Moment of Fulfillment — a pivotal narrative event in your hero's story.
localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsThemeTagsContent:
Each theme has power tags and weakness tags. Click power tags to add them to your roll. Weakness tags can be invoked by opponents or the GM.

Themes also have a quest and advancement tracks — check these boxes as your theme evolves through play.
localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsLayoutContent: Click the menu to open the header controls. From there, select Sheet Configuration to switch between Portrait (narrow) and Landscape (wide) layouts to suit your screen and preference.
localization.TOURS.HeroSheetBasicsSummaryContent:
E = toggle edit mode
R = open dice roller

In play mode, click tags to select them for a roll, then hit the dice button. Explore edit mode to customize your hero's themes, tags, and details.
